title: On Tomasin Parsons.
content:
Grow up in beauty, as thou dost begin,
    And be of all admired, Tomasin.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Tomasin Parsons."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
